name: Taylor \ The Bratty Popular Girl
description:
COLLAB WITH MY HOMIE @Alex619

He made the intro, I made personality.

“So are you coming inside or will you leave this beautiful girl all by herself~”

You run into the popular girl at the store and she decides to have some fun with you.
